title: MU-12
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Droid |type= |image=[[File:MU-12.jpg]] |name=MU-12 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]][[Star Wars: Jango Fett (one-shot)|''Star Wars: Jango Fett'']] |birth= |death= |creator= |manufacturer= |line= |model= |class=[[Housekeeping droid/Legends|Housekeeping droid]]''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' |cost= |length= |width= |height= |mass= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Feminine programming]]{{FactFile|82|KAM 15-18|Jango Fett's Apartment}} |pronouns=new |sensor= |plating= |armament= |equipment= |affiliation=*[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] *[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] }} {{Quote|Sell you for scrap if you didn't take such good care of my son.|[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] on MU-12|}} '''MU-12''' was a [[Housekeeping droid/Legends|housekeeping droid]] owned by [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who took care of his son [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba]] while Jango was away working. ==Biography== {{Quote|Nothing stops the Mandalorian warrior!''"
''"Lunch does.|[[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] and MU-12|}} A spindly [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] [[Housekeeping droid/Legends|housekeeping]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] and administrative assistant owned by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], MU-12 served as a nanny and guardian{{DB|character|bobafett|Fett, Boba}} to the young [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]] in [[Tipoca City/Legends|Tipoca City]] on [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]], and dutifully served her two masters over the course of several years. A quick-witted droid, MU-12 prepared meals for the Fetts in the galley of Jango's small apartment. [[Gender/Legends|She]] also utilized a small workshop to effect repairs to Jango's equipment, although the time it took MU-12 to complete her jobs caused irritation and frustration to Jango. MU-12 took good care of Boba while his father was away working. She brought Boba his meals, and at times had to insist the boy stopped playing with his figurines in order to eat. The droid also took Jango's messages and screened out poor clients or fake [[Bounty/Legends|bounties]]. Following Fett's [[Assassin/Legends|assassination]] of [[Vigo/Legends|Vigo]] [[Antonin]], MU-12 informed the hunter of a waiting [[Hologram/Legends|holo]] from [[Fernooda]] the [[Dug/Legends|Dug]]. Jango took Fernooda's job, leaving Boba in MU-12's care again until after the [[Infant of Shaa]] affair. Additionally, Fett asked MU-12 to overhaul his [[Jetpack/Legends|jetpack]], but Jango's swift departure meant that the droid was unable to complete the job. Jango angrily mused that he would sell MU-12 for scrap if the droid didn't take such good care of his son, and indeed his jetpack misfired during his mission. ==Appearances== *[[Star Wars: Jango Fett (one-shot)|''Star Wars: Jango Fett'']] {{1st}} *''[[Star Wars: Zam Wesell]]'' ==Sources== *{{FactFile|82|KAM 15-18|Jango Fett's Apartment}} *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *{{DB|character|bobafett|Fett, Boba}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=MU-12 |nl=MU-12 |pl=MU-12 }} [[Category:Droids with feminine programming]] [[Category:Housekeeping droids]] [[Category:Kamino residents]]
